title: (disguised) BETWEEN clause not recognised. Hence no rangejoin.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INT, name VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE range_table (start_value INT, end_value INT);
SELECT rt.start_value FROM range_table rt JOIN test_table tt ON tt.value BETWEEN rt.start_value AND rt.end_value;
key_bug_features: BETWEEN clause not recognized in SQL query
